questions.question: Explain the difference between chdir() and fchdir() functions with examples
expectedPoints: fchdir() takes file descriptor as argument
fchdir() requires opening directory first with open()

questions.question: Write a complete C program that creates a directory hierarchy, demonstrates directory navigation, and cleans up with proper error handling
expectedPoints: Use mkdir() to create multiple directories
Use chdir() to navigate between directories
Use getcwd() to display current directory
Use rmdir() to remove directories (must be empty)
Check return values of all function calls
